title: Bring Me the Head of Carmen M.
original_title: Tragam-Me a Cabeça de Carmen M.
overview: Ana, a Portuguese actress, dives into Brazil's current atmosphere of identity and political crisis while trying to portray in a feature film the colourful life of famous singer and actress Carmen Miranda, who helped define Brazil's identity.
